title.en: Computer Architecture: A Quantitative Approach (6th Edition) Study Guide
title.zh: 《计算机体系结构：量化研究方法（第6版）》学习手册

description.en: A reading guide and study notebook for CAQA 6th edition, focused on quantitative analysis, memory hierarchy, parallelism, and preparation for later GPGPU learning.
description.zh: 围绕《计算机体系结构：量化研究方法（第6版）》整理的阅读顺序与学习记录，重点关注定量分析、存储层次、并行性以及后续 GPGPU 学习准备。
